scripts.build:shared: bun build src/frontend/webkit/index.ts --outfile src/frontend/static/js/webkit/index.js --target browser --format esm
scripts.build:frontend: bun build src/frontend/rorschach.ts --outdir src/frontend/static/js --target browser --format esm --entry-naming 'rorschach.js' --external lit --external 'lit/*' --external '@rorschach/webkit' --minify
scripts.build:plugins: for dir in src/plugins/*/ui; do [ -d "$dir" ] && name=$(basename $(dirname "$dir")) && bun build "$dir/index.ts" --outfile "src/frontend/static/js/plugins/$name.js" --target browser --format esm --external lit --external 'lit/*' --external '@rorschach/webkit' --minify; done
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:shared && bun run build:frontend && bun run build:plugins
scripts.dev:frontend: bun build src/frontend/rorschach.ts --outdir src/frontend/static/js --target browser --format esm --entry-naming 'rorschach.js' --external lit --external 'lit/*' --external '@rorschach/webkit' --watch
scripts.dev: bun run build:shared && (bun run dev:frontend & bun run dev:backend)
scripts.rorschach: bun run build && bun run src/index.ts
